purpose: Shared, language-agnostic provenance contract so the E2 Python/Docker harness (repo hit-sdd-bench-e2) emits run artifacts inspectable under the same discipline as E1 (Bun/TS, this repo). Mirror, do not import.

hashing.text_or_bytes: hash_text(v) = sha256(utf8_bytes(v)).hex(); a str and its utf8 bytes hash identically

directory.collect: recurse the directory collecting file paths; SKIP directories named '.git' or 'node_modules'
directory.key: each file keyed by its POSIX relative path to the root (forward slashes)
directory.order: entries inserted in ascending sorted relative-path order (code-point sort; ASCII paths == code-unit order, matching JS .toSorted())
directory.canonicalization: hash = hash_text(JSON.stringify(files)) where the JSON is COMPACT (no spaces; separators ',' and ':'), insertion-ordered, raw unicode (ensure_ascii=false). Python: json.dumps(files, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False)

golden_vectors._note: Regenerate from src/snapshot.ts if canonicalization ever changes; pinned in hit-sdd-bench-e2/tests/test_hashing_roundtrip.py

run_record_fields._status: DRAFT — pinned as components land (M5). Mirrors hit-sdd-bench result-schema-v1 + summary.md run-card.
required: valid (replay-valid: re-run patch in clean container reproduces recorded hashes)

phase1_gate_outputs._note: Phase 1 decides go/no-go on A/B only; C-equivalent data is MEASURED not gated.
phase1_gate_outputs.gate_a_feasibility: all tasks run end-to-end + replay-valid; patch-induced flake upper-bound <=5% over >=60 runs/task
phase1_gate_outputs.gate_b_contamination: memorization probe per task below the 95th-percentile of a post-cutoff negative-control null; replenish to a clean target count
